purpose: Present geographic data — regional variations, spatial patterns, and location-based insights that text alone cannot convey.
writingRules: Must include a legend explaining colors, sizes, and symbols
Regional names must match official census or government designations
Contentious borders must follow Government of India mapping standards
Highlight 2–3 key regional insights in text
Interactive maps should default to national view, zoom to region on click
seoRules: Region names should appear in text for geographic keyword targeting
Alt text must describe the geographic pattern shown
